/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -static "CMakeFiles/app-builder.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-builder.dir/packager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-builder.dir/desktop_parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-builder.dir/dependency_analyzer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-builder.dir/template_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-builder.dir/home/ruanjian/workspace/project/apppack/common/file_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-builder.dir/home/ruanjian/workspace/project/apppack/common/compressor.cpp.o" -o app-builder
